name: Basic Lamb Balti
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the ghee in a karahi.
2. Stir-fry the garlic quickly for about 30 seconds.
3. Add the chopped onion and reduce the heat. Fry until translucent and starting to brown, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the pre-cooked lamb and Balti masala paste. Increase the heat and stir-fry for about 5 minutes until the meat is well coated with the spices.
5. Slowly add the stock (approximately 2 cups) while stirring gently on low heat. Simmer for about 10 minutes, or until the lamb is nearly tender.
6. Check the tenderness of the lamb; if needed, add a little more stock or water and continue simmering.
7. When almost tender enough, stir in the garam masala and chopped coriander leaf.
8. Salt to taste. Continue simmering for another 15 minutes until the lamb is fully cooked through.
9. Serve with naan bread.
